channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats' Dismissal of Platner Scandal Shows Kavanaugh Hearings Were a Partisan Witch Hunt
item.description: Democrats now question Platner's accusers, despite previously treating Kavanaugh's accusers as credible.

item.title: A D-Day Model of Leadership America Should Seek to Follow
item.description: General Eisenhower's words offer a leadership example for America's next 250 years.

item.title: It Will Be Hard for Democrats to Replace Graham Platner
item.description: A Biden- or Torricelli-style swap will not be easy to execute.

item.title: House passes Ukraine aid bill, bypassing GOP leadership
item.description: The House passed a bipartisan bill to aid Ukraine and sanction Russia, bypassing GOP leadership and President Trump.
